order_received.label: Conferma ricezione ordine
order_received.subject: Thank you for your order! 🍷
order_received.body:
Dear {nome},
thank you so much for your order! We are thrilled to have you as a customer.

We have received your order, and our team will process it as soon as possible. Once your order is ready, we will hand it over to our shipping partner, who will handle all export and customs documentation.
You will receive a separate email as soon as your order is on its way.

In the meantime, if you have any questions, do not hesitate to reply to this email — we are always happy to help.

Warm regards,
Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

day0.label: Conferma spedizione (Giorno 0)
day0.subject: Your wine is on its way! 🍷
day0.body:
Dear {nome},
your order has been shipped and is now on its way to you!
For your convenience {tracking_line}
Delivery will be completed as quickly as possible.
We will keep you updated as soon as we have news from customs or the final carrier.

Thank you for choosing Il Ciliegio!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

day10.label: Reminder 10 giorni (Standard e Express)
day10.subject: Shipping update — your order
day10.body:
Dear {nome},
here is an update on your shipment, which has been on its way for 10 days now.

At this stage, your order is likely crossing the ocean, going through mountains or preparing for customs clearance.
We will write to you as soon as we receive any news from the carrier.
If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email.

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

day20.label: Reminder 20 giorni (solo Standard)
day20.subject: Your wine is still on its way — update
day20.body:
Dear {nome},
20 days have passed since your order was shipped.
Standard shipments to some destinations can take up to 30 days for customs clearance and final delivery.
We are monitoring the situation and will update you as soon as the carrier provides any news.

We appreciate your patience!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

in_consegna.label: In consegna (dogana superata)
in_consegna.subject: Your wine is out for delivery! 🍷
in_consegna.body:
Dear {nome},
your order has cleared customs, and UPS is now delivering it to your address!

For your convenience {tracking_line}
Please note that a signature from an adult (21+) is required upon delivery.
Make sure someone is available to sign for the package, as carriers may not leave wine shipments unattended.
If you need to reschedule the delivery or pick it up at a UPS location, you can do so directly through the UPS tracking link above.
We are almost there — thank you for your patience!

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

consegnato.label: Ordine consegnato
consegnato.subject: Your order has been delivered! 🍷 Enjoy!
consegnato.body:
Dear {nome},
great news!
Your order has been successfully delivered. 🎉
We hope you enjoy Il Ciliegio products.
If you have any questions or feedback, do not hesitate to contact us — your opinion is very valuable to us.

Stay healthy and enjoy IL CILIEGIO!
Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

dogana.label: In dogana
dogana.subject: Your order is going through customs
dogana.body:
Dear {nome},
your order is currently going through customs. This process usually takes 2–5 business days.
Normally, no action is required on your part.
If you are required to pay taxes or duties, you will receive a message from customs with further information.

We will update you as soon as your order is on its way again.
Thanks for your help and your understanding!
For your convenience {tracking_line}

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899

problema.label: Problema spedizione
problema.subject: ⚠ Important update on your shipment
problema.body:
Dear {nome},
I am reaching out regarding your order.
Unfortunately, an issue has occurred with the shipment, and we are already actively monitoring the situation.
Our team is working to resolve the matter, and we will keep you updated as soon as possible.
For any urgent questions, please reply directly to this email.

For your convenience {tracking_line}

Luca Pattaro
Il Ciliegio — Viticoltori in Monteriggioni dal 1952
shop@ilciliegio.com | +39 331 1347899
